atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for the last three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is not getting better.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has been doing a lot of work in his basement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he has been putting in a new ceiling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient does not know if the pain is from that activity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is not taking any tylenol for the pain recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to a rotator cuff tendinopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer the patient to physical therapy for approximately six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor does not prescribe anything else for the pain, as it's working pretty good.
